name: MMM Weird Adventure
short_description: Play as an amnesiac cyborg exploring the Weird World, meeting all sorts of bizarre characters, and building your combat record through real-time battles and meaningful choices. A unique visual novel blending surreal comedy and action.
detailed_description:
The story takes place in the mysterious realm of the Weird World where the mind manifests as physical space.

In this surreal dimension, anything that can be imagined can become real, and inexplicable phenomena are part of everyday life.

You explore the Weird World through the perspective of a memory lost machine.

In this world, people live under a strange rule that anyone’s recent combat record automatically appears when you encounter them.

To boost their win rates, people aggressively challenge each other to fights and you are no exception.

Engage in conversations and battles, interact with the bizarre residents of the Weird World, and uncover the truth behind this strange land.

Surreal Comedy

A weird comedy unfolds in a world where common sense no longer applies.

You’ll meet eccentric characters, get caught in absurd events, and embrace the freedom of imagination beyond logic and reason.

2D First-Person Real-Time Battles

Fight from a first-person perspective in 2D environments.

React in real-time with attacks, guards, and dodges to counter your opponent’s moves.

Challenge a variety of skilled fighters in the Weird World, each with their own techniques and battle styles, and build up your combat record.

Visual Novel

Your choices matter.

This game unfolds as a visual novel, where rich dialogue and multiple choices let you gather information and shape the outcome.

Your decisions will determine the fate of the world and yourself.
